heroTagline: Engineering Scalable Web Systems with Clean Architecture & Real-World Impact
heroFocus: API-first architecture, structured systems, and maintainable engineering workflows for long-term product growth.
about: I am a Frontend Developer transitioning into Full-Stack Engineering, with hands-on experience building scalable academic and productivity platforms. My work focuses on structured architecture, API-driven systems, performance optimization, and secure web practices. I design systems that are maintainable, scalable, and engineered for long-term growth rather than quick demos.
